name: resume-app
description: Root workspace — wraps scripts across backend/ and mini-program/.

scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix mini-program run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix backend run lint:fix && npm --prefix mini-program run lint:fix
scripts.perf:bench:ci: cd backend && BENCH_P99_MS=1500 BENCH_P95_MS=800 BENCH_DURATION=5000 node scripts/perf-bench.js
